# Architectural Map: Gemini CLI Skill System
High-density registry of agentic capabilities optimized for local execution and forensic analysis.

## Core Entry Points
- `104a.mfdb.bejson`: Central MFDB manifest (The Source of Truth).
- `[skill-name]/SKILL.md`: Individual procedural instruction sets.

## Module Index
- `advanced-skill-builder`: Standardized architect for new skill development.
- `agentic-doc-architect`: 2026-standard documentation generator.
- `perceptual-decomposition`: Recursive forensic analysis and pattern recognition.
- `persistent-update-protocol`: Staged refactoring framework with disk checkpoints.
- `bejson-core-manager`: Definitive manager for BEJSON 104/104a/104db data operations.
- `bejson-cognitive-state`: Agentic state management and security sandboxing.
- `becss`: BEJSON-standardized CSS refactoring and OKLCH tokenization.
- `concise-analysis-reporting`: High-density intelligence brief generator.
- `post-analysis-reporting`: Formal forensic dossier and architectural report constructor.
- `skill-registry-manager`: Administrative tool for registry auditing and federation.

## Data Structures
- `SkillRegistry (104a)`: Fields: `entity_name`, `file_path`, `description`, `version`.
- `UpdateStaging (104)`: Fields for persistent task tracking and recovery.

## External Dependencies
- `Gemini CLI`: Primary runtime and tool orchestration layer.
- `BEJSON/MFDB`: Core data exchange and storage standards.

## Development Pathways
- Sync: `cp -r ~/.gemini/skills/* ~/build/skill_system/`
- Register: Update `104a.mfdb.bejson` manually or via `skill-registry-manager`.
- Test: Use `perceptual-decomposition` to audit registry integrity.

---
*Generated for AI Agent Context Optimization*
